subject: Continuous Random Variables
topic: §38 The Distribution of a Function of a Random Variable
question: An investment account earns an annual interest rate $R$ that follows a uniform distribution on the interval $(0.04, 0.08)$. The value of a 10,000 initial investment in this account after one year is given by $V = 10{,}000 e^R$. Determine the cumulative distribution function, $F_V(v)$ of $V$.
